# Deployment Architecture

## Environments
- **Development:** Local Python environment via `pip install -e ".[dev]"`
- **Production:** Installed via `pip install -e .` or PyPI package [?]

## System Requirements
| Requirement | Details |
|-------------|---------|
| OS | Linux, macOS, Windows |
| Python | >=3.11 |
| Audio | PortAudio library (portaudio19-dev / portaudio) |
| RAM | Minimal — audio buffers are small |

## No CI/CD
- No GitHub Actions, no GitLab CI, no Jenkins
- No automated deployment pipeline

## Distribution
- **PyPI** (planned) — standard Python package distribution
- **Source** — clone and install via pip

## Installation Commands
```bash
# Development
pip install -e ".[dev]"

# Production
pip install spectral

# From source
python3 -m pip install -e .
```

## No Containerization
- No Docker, no container images defined
- User must have PortAudio installed system-wide
